content.text: I need a function that reliably extracts a video or room ID from different URL formats used by live streams on qq.com.
If a URL includes query parameters after the ID, will the function still correctly identify it?

Currently, the regex patterns are strictly defined to capture only digits immediately following '/'. If you need to handle dynamic parameters like '?...' appended to the ID, you would need to adjust your regular expressions.
That makes sense; I will ensure my input URLs conform to the expected format.
